alternative_parents.description: Organic Compounds containing a benzene ring which bears at least one carboxyl group.

alternative_parents.description: Phenols that a unsubstituted at the 2-position.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the acyl fluoride functional group.
alternative_parents.name: Aryl fluorides

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a hydroxyl group, which is indirectly attached to a carbonyl via an intervening vinyl (>C=C<) moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Vinylogous acids

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing metals and halogens. Some are ionic while others are covalently bonded.

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a carboxylic acid group with the formula -C(=O)OH.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a potassium ion.

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a chemical bond between a carbon atom and a fluorine atom.

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds with a positive electric charge.

class.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.
class.name: Benzene and substituted derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as biphenyls and derivatives. These are organic compounds containing to benzene rings linked together by a C-C bond.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing to benzene rings linked together by a C-C bond.
direct_parent.name: Biphenyls and derivatives

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

predicted_lipidmaps_terms: Diphenyl ethers, biphenyls, dibenzyls and stilbenes (PK1309)

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing to benzene rings linked together by a C-C bond.
subclass.name: Biphenyls and derivatives

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
